title: EU AI Act Compliance Checker — Input
description: Provide the text to audit and the kind of AI deployment it describes.

text.title: Text to audit
text.description: Voice agent script, chatbot opening message, generated content brief, deepfake marketing copy, or biometric system description. Up to ~20,000 characters. Accepts input in English, Latvian, Lithuanian, Estonian, and Russian.
text.prefill: Hello, this is Anna from BrightHouse Energy. How are you doing today? I'm reaching out because we've helped homeowners cut their electricity bill by 30%.

deployment_type.title: Deployment type
deployment_type.description: What kind of AI deployment is being audited.
